entry.title: Re: Restrict CR types based on Authorization Group in MDG-BP
entry.content:
Hi

The Best solution for this would be to design the roles with the restriction on the Change Request Type. This will be a clean solution without dependency on any enhancement. The Auth Object USMD_CREQ is provided for this purpose.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Vietnam Statutory req: Multiple country COA postings(Reporting) with a single operational COA G/
entry.content: Hello, We meet a similar case now, and also consider to have a Z_table for a substitution rule. But since alternative account is not in COBL structure, how did you deal with CO-OM allocation postings, like assessment between cost centers? Thank you!!

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [2]: Creating custom business events
entry.content:
Hi @TimoMaier ,

Is it possible to add a variable in the topic? Following your example, the country of the address?

This would allow us to create subscriptions in AEM based on the country, as we could have an external system that is only relevant for one country and not interested in the rest of the changes.

By adding this data to the topic, it wouldn't be necessary to open the message to check if it is relevant, and AEM would already distribute the message correctly.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Infopackage, Transformation and DTP for Standard DSO...
entry.content: Thank you Mr.Roland

entry.title: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Recently we have activated FIORI in our sandbox system, we have activated service in SICF as well. 

When we are testing the service via SICF application is working but when we open the app from launchpad then we are getting Error message as below. Please note same application is working fine in other system.

In devtools there are so many errors I have found

Let me know if any notes need to apply or any configuration missed.

Advance thanks for your help.

Regards,

Nutan

entry.title: Getting Error in BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE -> ME/083-Enter Qty Conversion. Just changing the Contr. item
entry.content:
Getting this error while Using bapi to change contract items in BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE, full error log below : {
"code": "BAPI/003",
"message": "Instance PurchasingContract of object type 4600000308 could not be changed",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "MEPO/077",
"message": "Outline agreement still contains faulty items",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "MEOUT/018",
"message": "No message generated for output of purchasing document",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "warning",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "ME/083",
"message": "Enter Qty Conversion",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "/IWBEP/CX_MGW_BUSI_EXCEPTION",
"message": "An exception was raised",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},

entry.title: Signing in to SAP Business one with Two Factor Authentication
entry.content:
Dear   All,

Anyone have implemented SAP Business one client with Two Factor Authentication.

I would like to implement signing in to SAP Business one client with Two Factor Authentication.

For this help is about signing to SLD , not client. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_IAM/548d6202b2b6491b824a488cfc447343/e2c7c60268934432a0639d014d7fcdf2.html

Please advise me. Thank you.

Best Regards,

Peearput N.

entry.title: Re: RAP OData v4 Web-API metadata nullable action paramet...
entry.content: Hi @AbhishekSharma thanks for your answer. Sorry if I did not ask precisely. The nullable option I want to change is in the metadata document. I attached a screenshot of the part that I want to influence.

entry.title: Re: Customer Ageing Query in Hana for SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello @azacc ,

Can you try this one?

SELECT
    T1."CardCode", 
    T1."CardName", 
    T1."CreditLine", 
    T0."RefDate", 
    T0."Ref1" AS "Document Number",
    CASE
        WHEN T0."TransType" = 13 THEN 'Invoice'
        WHEN T0."TransType" = 14 THEN 'Credit Note'
        WHEN T0."TransType" = 30 THEN 'Journal'
        WHEN T0."TransType" = 24 THEN 'Receipt'
    END AS "Document Type",
    T0."DueDate",
    (T0."Debit" - T0."Credit") AS "Balance",
    
    -- Calculate future balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= -1 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "Future",

    -- Calculate current balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') >= 0 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 30 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "Current",

    -- Calculate 31-60 days balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 30 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 60 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "31-60 Days",

    -- Calculate 61-90 days balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 60 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 90 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "61-90 Days",

    -- Calculate 91-120 days balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 90 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 120 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "91-120 Days",

    -- Calculate 121+ days balance
    IFNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') >= 121 THEN T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" 
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        0
    ) AS "121+ Days"

FROM 
    "JDT1" T0
INNER JOIN 
    "OCRD" T1 ON T0."ShortName" = T1."CardCode"

 Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Comparing depreciation areas
entry.content:
Please remove tags other than SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: BAdI impl. ME_PROCESS_PO give an error message but th...
entry.content:
To add custom error message into PO screen:
mmpur_message_forced 'E' '<msgid>' '<msgno>' lv_msgv1 lv_msgv2 lv_msgv3 lv_msgv4.

To stop PO from saving:
 IF sy-ucomm EQ 'MESAVE'.
  "Prompt data incomplete dialog screen with 'Hold' button
  MESSAGE e000(mepo).
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Comparing depreciation areas
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Re: Part 1: Migrate your Data – Migration Cockpit (SAP S/4HANA 2020 and higher and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

As far as I know, LTMC/Migration cockpit can be used only for predefined objects for master data and transactional data. No customization/abap ....

 

BR,

danielaT

entry.title: Onboardees status in position org. chart
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have noticed that onboardees are visible in the org. chart before they are hired. I can also see that this is expected behavior. Ref. 3026712 - Candidates status in Position Org Chart - Onboarding

We do not want the candidates to be visible before they are officially hired. How can I prevent this?

entry.title: Re: Activate Open Item Management for G/L Accounts not having option to add co code and G/L account
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Re: SmartTable Excel Download Date format issue
entry.content:
Hi,

Please refer to this - https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/283217d8f187401c8045723abc27e5e0

When using Date EdmType, you should use 'format' property. You could write like this - 

{ property: "Duedate", label: "Due date (islamic)", type: sap.ui.export.EdmType.Date, format: "dd/mm/yyyy" } 

It is working for me. Hope it might solve your issue too.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA Fiori apps for Quality Management module
entry.content: Thank you so much for this info! 🙂

entry.title: Re: Geo map enrichment public dimension
entry.content: @William_Yu. I opened an incident for it, and the support colleague confirmed that he could simulate the same issue in their internal SAC system ... let's see what the outcome will be ... FYI, My SAC is version 2025.1.1

entry.title: Re: I need production order cost with all Production issu...
entry.content:
Hi @Deepak33 ,

I don't know if this will work for you or not.

SELECT 
X."BaseRef", 
X."BaseEntry",
(SELECT "ItemCode" FROM OWOR WHERE OWOR."DocNum"=X."BaseRef") AS "FG_CODE",
(SELECT "ProdName" FROM OWOR WHERE OWOR."DocNum"=X."BaseRef") AS "FG_NAME",
SUM(X."FG_PRICE") AS "FG_PRICE",
SUM(X."RM_PRICE") AS "RM_PRICE"
FROM
(
SELECT T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry",  SUM(T0."Quantity"* T0."StockPrice") AS "FG_PRICE" ,0  AS "RM_PRICE"
FROM IGN1 T0 
WHERE T0."BaseType" =202
GROUP BY T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry"
UNION ALL
SELECT T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry",  0 AS "FG_PRICE",SUM(T0."Quantity"* T0."StockPrice") AS "RM_PRICE" 
FROM IGE1 T0 
WHERE T0."BaseType" =202
GROUP BY T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry"
)X
WHERE X."BaseRef"=124020350
GROUP BY X."BaseRef", X."BaseEntry"

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Goods issue in S/4 without using EWM for delivery note printout

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: XSUAA BTP Service Implementation for Custom Python APP
entry.content: Just a minor correction in the blog since we are binding the application with the service we don't need to generate service key as mentioned above. Application bounded will use the credentials from the service. External services need the service key generation.

entry.title: No QM certificate for delivery with mess QC090
entry.content:
Hello,

can anybody assist me during processing Q certificate for delivery. QC21/22 output works fine and show all inspected class characteristics or MIC with upper and lower limits.  Also the message type LQCA in delivery was found cert. profile but throw in cert view:

Message no. QC090

In batch XXX Material XXXX the specification data for characteristic 0010 from certificate profile XXX Certificate type 0003 Version 000001 was not found (master record: Plant XXX Master inspection characteristic 500000X).

with green lights

or if i change from MIC(1) to Classch.(2) in cert. profile: same error..

Classification with mat. specification de/activated in customizing (i have tried both cases) . BmCC show no class. error.

Display modes for insp. ch. in Customizing also defined. Cert. print program is SAP standard.

Thank you in advance! SAP ERP 

Johannes

entry.title: Do we have Purchase Proposals in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

Can someone confirm that , we do we have Purchase Proposals in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud or not ?

I have tried to look into the SAP Signavio Process Navigator --> Solution Scenario , but I didn't see any document which refer to it or in the flow diagram it exists in between.

Did anyone has face the same issue in past ? my requirement is I need MRP to propose Purchase Proposals instead of Purchase Request.

Ask me for more clarification if required.

 

Thanks

Ashish

entry.title: Downpayment Clearing in "Create Supplier Invoice" App
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using "Create Supplier Invoice" application to post supplier invoices. For few customers we have made advance payment, during Invoice posting there is no option for Down Payment clearing. But in MIRO (Create Supplier Invoice - Advanced) we can clear the down payment. Most of our users were using "Create Supplier Invoice", Kindly provide a solution to clear down payment in "Create Supplier Invoice" Application.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance 

Regards,

Ajeesh

We have a scenario where we need to replicate the contact relationship from SAP CRM On-Premise to SAP CDP. The Accounts ( Groups) and Contacts ( Profiles) are already integrated via CPI. Please help with steps needed to setup the integration needed to replicate the relationships

 

Best Regards,

Jai

entry.title: Re: SE16N - label not visible
entry.content: @DanieleInc  Thankyou for your great help

entry.title: Firebase Integration Issues
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I think there might be an issue with Firebase push notifications.

The mechanism to get the device's Firebase token works fine, and the sending process I’m using (a Python script) also works because the notifications are being delivered.

The problem seems to be with the reporting in the Firebase Console. The data I’m seeing there doesn’t make sense.

For example, here’s my latest send:

  • Total sent: 418
  • Received: 0
  • Impressions: 0
  • Opens: 1

These numbers are inconsistent on multiple levels:

  • At least 4 devices, which I personally checked, received the notification.
  • It’s impossible for 0 devices to have received the notification, yet for 1 to have opened it!

Is anyone else experiencing something like this?

Thanks!

entry.title: The SAP HANA Cloud Videocast is back for Season 2!
entry.content:
SAP HANA Cloud Videocast Hosts Susen Poppe & Thomas Hammer are ready for season 2!

End of last year, we have been looking for a fun and engaging way to share more insights about different topics in SAP HANA Cloud. After quite some brainstorming, we came up with the idea of a videocast. 

Personally, I am big fan of podcasts, they are easy to consume everywhere at any time. You got some cleaning to do – why don’t you listen to a podcast? Cooking dinner – how about tuning in to your favorite podcast? Walking your dog – learning something new from that podcast you just found? And so on and so forth.  

That why we went live with season 1 of the SAP HANA Cloud Videocast in September 2024. If you have missed season one, definitely take a look at the five episodes we published. The first season mainly focused on the vector engine, which we just released last year. But why don’t you have a look yourself 

Episode 1: SAP HANA Cloud Podcast with Stefan Bäuerle 

Discover the power of SAP HANA Cloud! In this exclusive interview, Stefan, Head of BTP HANA and Persistency at SAP, and Sabrina Pfeffer, Senior Project Consultant, reveal how SAP HANA has revolutionized industries and why SAP HANA Cloud is the key of success for your business. Learn about the incredible benefits of modernizing to the cloud, from cost savings to seamless scalability, and get a sneak peek into SAP’s innovative roadmap. Watch now to take your SAP HANA Cloud journey to the next level! 

Episode 2: SAP HANA Cloud Podcast with Matt Zenus 

Join us for an exclusive interview with Matt Zenus, the leader of SAP's global Database Product Management and Strategy Team and Sabrina Pfeffer, Senior Project Consultant at BTP HANA & Persistency. Learn more about creating Intelligent Data Applications, the revolutionary SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine, and a sneak peek into upcoming innovations. 

Episode 3: SAP HANA Cloud Podcast with Tobias Mindnich 

Join us for an exclusive interview with Tobias Mindnich, leading the BTP HANA Analytics & Multi Model team and Sabrina Pfeffer, Senior Project Consultant at BTP HANA & Persistency. Tune in for insights on multi-model query processing engines, the innovative SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine, and the significant impact of SAP HANA Cloud on analytics. Get ready for some valuable insights! 

Episode 4: SAP HANA Cloud Podcast with Susen Poppe 

Join us for an exclusive interview with Susen Poppe, SAP HANA Cloud Product Manager and Sabrina Pfeffer, Senior Project Consultant at BTP HANA & Persistency. Learn about the integration, benefits, and advantages, the SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine offers for developers in terms of data management and query capabilities. Get insight into how the Vector Engine facilitates the storage and analysis of complex and unstructured vector data for intelligent data applications. 

Episode 5: SAP HANA Cloud Podcast with Thomas Hammer 

Join us for an exclusive interview with Thomas Hammer, Lead Product Manager for SAP HANA Cloud and Sabrina Pfeffer, Senior Project Consultant at BTP HANA & Persistency. Listen in for insights into various use cases from our esteemed customers. From streamlining operations to Business AI, SAP HANA Cloud’s capabilities are proven by real world customer use cases. Tune in for more details! 

After a few months break, we are now more than excited to be back with season two of the SAP HANA Cloud Videocast! This season we have a bunch of experts joining us introducing many great topics, discussing use cases and letting us know where to get started leveraging some of the great features that are an integral part of SAP HANA Cloud. 

Curious? We will release the first episode on January 28 and will then continue to publish more episodes twice a month, so definitely stay tuned to learn more about native multi-tenancy in SAP HANA Cloud at the end of January. 

In this first episode, my colleague and SAP HANA Cloud expert Rüdiger Karl will be talking about one of the release highlights from our Q4 delivery of SAP HANA Cloud. We will be discussing multi-tenancy in the cloud, internal SAP use cases and resources that will kickstart your journey with native multi-tenancy in SAP HANA Cloud.  

As mentioned, more episodes will follow over the course of the next months and will feature topics like SQL on Files, Knowledge Graph engine, migration and many many more.  

If you do not want to miss any news about SAP HANA Cloud, make sure to follow the whatsnewinsaphanacloud tag in the SAP Community.

entry.title: In SAP Public cloud -At the time of Asset scrap equipment status not changing to "Deleted"
entry.content: In SAP Public Cloud, I am using the serial number profile for Asset procurement and also configured to auto creation of Equipment at the time of Asset GRN but when scrapping the associated Asset then the Equipment status not changing to "Deleted"

entry.title: Re: ABAP - OLE MS-WORD (save .docx as PDF)
entry.content:
Does this approach works only in Dialog mode? Is there any way to convert word document to pdf in back-ground? I would like to do it when it is triggered from from an API. I was able to convert the word document to binary format. From this binary data , I would like to convert it into PDF.

Is there any way to do it?

entry.title: Re: In SAP Public cloud -At the time of Asset scrap equipment status not changing to "Deleted&q
entry.content: Can anyone help me with the possible reason and also please suggest a workaround if this functionality is not available in Public cloud

entry.title: SF - Time Sheet - Recording of Allowances
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

I need your expertise. I have a question regarding time tracking in SuccessFactors. Is it possible to implement a restriction within the time sheet so that only one allowance of a particular allowance type can be recorded per day? I haven't found any way to configure this so far. 

Any hints or suggestions are highly appreciated. 

Thank you & kind regards, 

Alexandra

entry.title: Re: SAC - Translation of public Dimensions
entry.content:
@mtayibi 

Only Descriptions of the dimension member support translation in multiple languages.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/861a276019554b578f2f5161e5eb75ba.html?q=translation#adding-member-descriptions-in-multiple-languages

You can try enabling model translation as discussed below but this will translate property descriptions and not property value descriptions. same goes for Hierarchies.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/16fa42a7ece9468a82a92d13e4dcbd84.html?q=translation#enabling-a-model-for-translation

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Transaction VL10G - quantity of pallets - items with reason for rejection
entry.content:
We use VL10G to book our orders with our hauliers.

However for example when an order consists of 10 pallets but 2 lines have a reason for rejection in the order. And these 2 lines had together 3 pallets, we actually only have 7 pallets to transport. Only 7 pallets will come in the outbound delivery.

Is there any way we can make sure that calculation of pallets in VL10G takes into account the orderlines that have a reason for rejection ?

And maybe also takes into account items that are not available. Currently these items are also in VL10G and will not be available, thus not in the delivery, thus should not be transported.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Goods issue in S/4 without using EWM for delivery not...
entry.content:
Hello @AAkash1 

As per SAP standard configuration in NACE - the delivery note is implemented with the LD00 output type:

The output type is assigned to the V10000 procedure without any requirements:

Thus LD00 can be determined for an outbound delivery even if goods issue is not posted yet.

Of course, your configuration might differ from the SAP standard.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Reverse a Material to dekit the components
entry.content:
Hello @TedJ 

Post the movement type 102 for material A to remove it from the inventory and the movement type 262 for the components to bring them back to inventory. Those postings can be created in MIGO against a production order.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Configuration in S/4HANA for mapping SAC Account type...
entry.content:
@JSEN 

This is what I found I had from SAC planning for S4. ViewThe CDS view displayed is C_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE

I think it should be semantic tags for Assets and Liabilities/Equity and node sign inversion for PL

Nikhil

entry.title: SAC on Signage TV iiyama
entry.content:
Hello i am wondering if there is a possbility to display reports on a TV. 
I see that you can create a link and access but only SAC users can access. Is there a way to make some kind of kiosk mode of a report so that i can easily share this on our TV?

If not, is there any possiblity to generate a URL with my credentials to to auto login and display the report?

What other solutions are possible?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Automation Pilot : Start & Stop HANA Instance, Schedule Executions on Automation Pilot
entry.content:
Hi All, can you tell me, if start/stop activity is possible for HANA CLOUD created on other environment?

thanks

-GN

entry.title: Asset Accounting - "No Operating Concern has assigned to Controlling Area" while AFAB for Prev Year
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am encountering an issue while executing the following transactions in the S/4HANA system for the previous fiscal year (2024):

  • Depreciation Run (AFAB)
  • Asset Transfer (ABUMN)
  • Asset Acquisition (F-90)

The system throws the error:
"No Operating Concern has been assigned to the controlling area"

However, the Operating Concern is not activated in the system, not created aswell. This error does not occur in the current fiscal year (2025). Transactions are being posted successfully in the new fiscal year without encountering this issue.

Fiscal Year Details:

  • Fiscal Year: January to December
  • Current Fiscal Year: 2025
  • Previous Fiscal Year: 2024
  • Last Closed Fiscal Year: 2023
  • Balance Carryforward to FY 2025: Completed

Additional Information:

  • This project is Implementation (Realization Phase).
  • 3 Depreciation Areas (attached SS) and 2 Currency Types - 10 - OMR & 30 - OMR 
  • A screenshot of the Legacy Data Transfer status has been attached for reference.

Could you please provide insights into why this error is appearing only for the previous fiscal year?

Your comments and suggestions on this query would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks & Regards
Faris

entry.title: Re: Standard Currency Conversion in SAP Analytics Cloud: Portfolio Value Simulation
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to convert by specific Actual year rates using the conversion measure?

For fixed Date option it is required to specify the specific month. 

But in my case I would like to convert by specific year rates which will correspond to the months.

For example :

Jan 2022 by Jan 2024 rates

Feb 2022 by Feb 2024 rates

Mar 2022 by Mar 2024 rates

....

Is there a way to configure that?

Thank you

Yulia

entry.title: Request for Installation Media for NW AS ABAP 7.52 SP13
entry.content:
We have a requirement for the installation of SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP 7.52 SP13 for our customer.

 

However, we are unable to find the media on the SAP Support Portal.

 

Could you kindly assist us by providing the necessary media or download link?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request for Installation Media for NW AS ABAP 7.52 SP13
entry.content:
The Product Availability Matrix (PAM) provides you with information about SAP software releases: release types, maintenance durations, planned availability, and upgrade paths. The PAM also offers information about platform availability, including database platform and operating systems.
The SAP Software Download Center is the central location to download your company's SAP software.


You can download the SAP products that are associated with your S-user ID. Downloading files requires the Software Download authorization; to request it, contact a user administrator in your company.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: SVT - Issues with...
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

Thanks for the information.

I hope all is fine!


I found the answer to my previous question already 🙂

Cheerio
Harry

entry.title: In S4 what is a need of inbound delivery?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are not using a Warehouse management system. Our system is using SLs for materials management.

My questions is , why do we need an inbound delivery? as we can simply use PO to do a GR.

I want to understand the significance of using an inbound delivery in a process.

entry.title: Re: after create a new banner, the old title in the text...
entry.content: It actually took more than 24 hours. The banner was updated on Tuesday afternoon. This morning at around 8:00 a.m. I checked and the title was updated. Thank you for the replies!

entry.title: Re: Goods issue in S/4 without using EWM for delivery not...
entry.content: Hi Dominik, thanks for the quick response, as per SAP Standard we should print the delivery note once the goods issue is completed but as you suggest we can get the delivery note If needed by above approach.

entry.title: Re: India Localization Compliance Reports in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi Sahil, COuld you pelase let us know how to add additional columns to the GSTR1 report for Eg Bill to & Ship to Party details.

entry.title: sorter component shows an error message
entry.content: In version 1.131.1, the sorter component shows an error message. The message says that the value of vSorterInfo is not defined. After defining it, an error is displayed on the page.

entry.title: Re: Blank Screen when extending the project using SAP Web...
entry.content:
Hi,

It seems that the Reused Library used by the original SAP Fiori application, cannot be found in the on-premise system where the SAP Fiori application is located. 
I suggest trying to access this link directly in your browser (within internal network), with the direct host and port of your on-premise system (as defined in the Cloud Connector):
https://<on-premise-system-host>:<port>/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/FIN_VEN_LITS/sap/fin/arp/lib/lineitems/library.js
If you still get a 404 error with a direct access to the system, then I suggest checking that the FIN_VEN_LITS library is installed and activated in your system.
You can also look for the SAP Fiori original application that you are extending here: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/ and make sure that all its required configurations under section "Implementation Information" -> "Configurations" are done in your on-premise system.

Thanks,

Rotem

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elemenets Custom Action: Define Icon?
entry.content:
Hello,

     To add an icon to your action button in the controller, you can follow this approach:

let moveDownBtnId = this.getView().byId("<pass the button id here>");
const sIconURI_seqDown = IconPool.getIconURI("sap-icon://navigation-down-arrow");
moveDownBtnId.setIcon(sIconURI_seqDown);

This allows you to dynamically set an icon for your action button. You can replace the "sap-icon://navigation-down-arrow" with any other icon URI  that suits your needs.

This method should work without needing to hook into 'onBeforeRendering', and it aligns with your use case in S/4 2022 with SAPUI5 1.108.

Hope this helps!  

Regards,

Ananya

entry.title: Re: EBS Search Strings case sensitive
entry.content:
Hi Niels,
 @PFIN , 

If you work in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, I'd recommend you to have a look at the following documentation on the SAP Help Portal: Map Format Data for Incoming Files from Banks 

It contains more information about data mappings for file formats. 

Best regards,
Anita

Norbert

entry.title: JMX Remote connection to multiple instances using JMX port
entry.content:
Currently i have SAP Java NetWeaver installed and have a single instance 00 , JMX properties are added to it and Mbeans are accessible through this JMX port.



If i have multiple instances , other than 00 , different JMX port has to be enabled to connect to it ?

Is there a place where i can have 1 single JMX port that can get details about all the nodes ?

entry.title: Re: Mixed Storage not allowed
entry.content: When I'm trying to create a transfer order LT10 for a pallet with the same material and batch but with status "S" to another S-Type/Sbin with the same material and batch but with status "", I get the error message "Mixed storage is not allowed in storage type xxx". Capacity of Stype/Sbin allows one pallet more Is it possible that different statuses block the TO?

entry.title: Re: Multiple IDOCs based on multiple fields in File to IDOC mapping
entry.content: For this requirement, target side to which field we need to map I mean in target side idoc. Can anyone help me with this

entry.title: Re: In S4 what is a need of inbound delivery?
entry.content:
Hello @AAkash1 

Of course you can post GR against a PO without inbound deliveries. However using inbound deliveries has some advantages. This way you can register and monitor shipping notifications that a vendor sends. That gives additional visibility in the purchasing process. It is nicely explained in SAP Help Vendor Confirmations

 

Confirmations including inbound deliveries are especially important from MRP point of view:

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Cannot Execute Adjustment Confirmation
entry.content:
Hi,

This error: Action Failed -----> Serial number A1-97879 cannot be deleted; this is not the last active document basically occurs due to two reasons. Check the below mentioned details.

Scenario-1: If you have performed a Goods movement and moved the stock from Target Logistics Area A to B. The Adjustment confirmation is from the Target Logistics Area A.

Scenario-2: Also if you have performed Goods movement and moved the stock from Target Logistics area A to B and again from B to A, and you still see from Stock Overview that the stock is residing in LOA - A.

Ideally when you perform the goods movement, GAC's are created and the active documents corresponding the serial number gets updated. Thus if you go to Undo Release the Inbound Delivery id , the document tagging will be  still present for the GAC's and this prevents the adjustment.

Try to follow the below mentioned steps to resolve this issue,

Scenario-1: In order to solve the issue  you need to perform a reversal of the Transfer Goods & Activity Confirmation created and then  perform the adjustment Conformation.

  1. Navigate to Internal Logistics Work Center
  2. Go to Display / Reverse Goods And Activity Confirmations
  3. Search for relevant Transfer Goods & Activity Confirmation
  4. Select Reverse Confirmation
  5. Release and Undo release Inbound Delivery
  6. Now try performing Adjustment confirmation

Scenario-2:  In order to solve the issue  user need to perform a reversal of the latest Transfer Goods & Activity Confirmation  followed by another  Transfer Goods & Activity Confirmation  created and then  perform the adjustment Confirmation.

  1. Navigate to Internal Logistics Work Center
  2. Go to Display / Reverse Goods And Activity Confirmations
  3. Search for relevant latest Transfer Goods & Activity Confirmation
  4. Select Reverse Confirmation
  5. Search for another Transfer Goods & Activity Confirmation
  6. Select Reverse Confirmation
  7. Release and Undo release Inbound Delivery
  8. Now try performing Adjustment confirmation

Note: The Transfer GAC Id's can also be found in the Registered Products Detailed inventory tracking as well.

This will prevent the error, For more details try to check the KBA reference: https://i7p.wdf.sap.corp/sap(bD1lbiZjPTAwMQ==)/bc/bsp/sno/ui_entry/entry.htm?param=69765F6D6F64653D3030312669765F7361706E6F7465735F6E756D6265723D3030303330363539313226

Best Regards,

Abarna

entry.title: Re: Replication error
entry.content: Any solution for that

entry.title: Reversal of goods issue in case of invoice created
entry.content:
Hi,

in S/4 if I do a goods issue (Without using any WM) on an outbound delivery and invoice has been created.

Can I do a reversal of goods issue? 

I need to understand, in what cases I can do a reversal of goods issue and in which case not.

If I cannot do a reversal of goods issue, what is the standard process of doing that, for example I need to run returns process?

entry.content:
Good morning,
I faced with this kind of error during posting or deletion of INB in SAP EWM (on screenshots). I am not able to do anything with this delivery. Had you got similar issue and can you show proposal of solution?

Error directly after save deletion:

SM13 logs:

HUs for that INB exist, but in case any actions with that (unpacking, deletion) after save - error “Update was canceled” from first screen occurs again.


Thank you in advance in case any ideas.
Have a nice day
Tomasz

Ayse Ozgen

entry.title: Prepare for the Future: Major SAP SuccessFactors Changes Coming in 2025 and 2026
entry.content:
As we approach 2025 and 2026, SAP SuccessFactors is set to undergo significant transformations that will reshape how organizations manage their human capital. This period will see the phasing out of certain legacy features in favor of more streamlined and efficient solutions. Let's explore these upcoming changes to help your business navigate this transition smoothly.

Key Changes and Deprecations

1. Phasing Out of Legacy Features

  • Partial Organization Single Sign-On (SSO): This feature will be deprecated by November 13, 2026, with maintenance ending on May 16, 2025. Organizations are encouraged to transition to modern authentication methods to maintain security.
  • Legacy Configuration APIs: The retirement of APIs supporting legacy People Profile configurations is scheduled for mid-2025, promoting a better user experience with enhanced People Profile functionality.
  • Org Chart and Role-Based Permissions (RBP): Traditional Org Charts and the existing RBP system will be deprecated by May 2025, transitioning to an updated model for improved user experience and security.
  • Canvas and Dashboard Reports: Users are advised to migrate to newer reporting tools before their final removal in late 2025.
  • Built-In Support Interface: This legacy support feature will be discontinued by June 2025, paving the way for an updated support interface.

2. Authentication and Integration Enhancements

  • The expiration of the SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite Single Sign-On certificate is set for June 2, 2025. Customers must migrate to SAP Cloud Identity Services for continued access and security improvements.
  • Basic Authentication will cease maintenance on June 2, 2025, with complete removal by November 1, 2026. Users must transition to Identity Authentication services to ensure compliance with new security standards.

3. Deprecation of Employee Central SFAPIs

  • The SOAP-based SFAPIs for Employee Central (except the CompoundEmployee API) will reach the end of maintenance on May 17, 2024, and will be deleted on May 23, 2025. Customers need to convert their integrations to OData APIs in preparation for this change.

4. Onboarding Advancements

  • Onboarding 1.0 will gradually retire by mid-2026 as organizations shift towards more efficient onboarding processes within SAP SuccessFactors.

Preparing for the Future

To effectively manage these transitions, businesses should:

  • Stay Informed: Regularly consult SAP SuccessFactors' product release and road map information to stay updated on upcoming changes.

    SAP Community

  • Plan Ahead: Develop a strategic plan to adopt new features and retire outdated ones, ensuring minimal disruption to operations.

  • Engage Stakeholders: Communicate changes to all relevant parties, including IT, HR, and end-users, to facilitate a smooth transition.

Benefits of New Authentication and Onboarding Features

Transitioning to the new authentication services and Onboarding features offers several advantages:

  • Enhanced Security: Modern authentication methods provide stronger protection against unauthorized access.

  • Improved User Experience: The latest Onboarding solutions offer a more intuitive and engaging experience for new hires, aiding in their integration and productivity.

    SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding

  • Streamlined Processes: Integrating advanced technologies simplifies workflows, reducing administrative burdens and increasing efficiency.

Ensuring a Smooth Transition

To facilitate a seamless transition:

  • Conduct Training Sessions: Educate your teams on new features and processes to ensure they are well-prepared.

  • Leverage Support Resources: Utilize SAP's support and community forums to address any challenges during the transition.

  • Monitor and Adjust: Continuously assess the impact of changes and make necessary adjustments to optimize performance.

By proactively addressing these changes, organizations can enhance operational efficiency and prepare for future advancements in SAP SuccessFactors.

entry.title: IDOC ORDCHG - Schedule Line dates not updated
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, 

i have a problem with incoming IDOC ORDCHG. 

In the actual sales order, the availability determines all the schedule line dates, for example Delivery date = 01.03.2025

In field E1EDP20-EDATU i passed a new date to the sales order (01.04.2025). The IDOC is processed correctly and VBEP-EDATU is changed, but all the other schedule line dates are not updated (TranspPlngDate; Mat.Avail.Date; Loading Date; Goods Issue). They remain with the same value, even if the should be updated based on the new delivery date. 

If i perform this change manually it works, but if i performed it via interface, it does not work. 

Someone can help me? 

Thanks

S.

entry.title: SAP Business Network for Logistics 2412 and 2501 Release – What’s New?
entry.content:
This blog will give you an overview of the 2412 and 2501 release in SAP Business Network for Logistics. It is intended for shippers and solution owners, carriers, and data providers as well as sales and presales colleagues who already have a detailed understanding of SAP Business Network for Logistics. 

 

SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration

Dock Appointment Scheduling: sorting of loading points

In the calendar view, loading points are now sorted alphabetically. This applies both to the order of the tabs as well as to the order in the dropdown lists.

Settlement: using status ‘Submitted for Confirmation’ in external dispute process

Using the status ‘Submitted for Confirmation’ improves the external dispute process, which was requested in the influence portal by our customers. Now, when a dispute is resolved in SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration, the system sends the message to the ordering party's external system (SAP Transportation Management). Until the ordering party sends an acknowledgement from their external system, the dispute status in the ‘Manage Disputes’ app is set to ‘Submitted for Confirmation’.

 Settlement: new status ‘Rejected by Ordering Party’

Like the change above, this is also a request from influence portal regarding the app ‘Manage Invoices’. The new status is an enhancement to the external dispute process when the ordering party rejects the invoice.

 Settlement: modified status ‘Rejected’

In the ‘Manage Invoices’ app, the status ‘Rejected’ was changed to ‘Rejected by Dispute’.

 

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace

Update to UI5 version 1.131.1

The UI5 version of the SAP Fiori Launchpad for SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace was upgraded to 1.131.1.

Supporting OAuth2.0 Client Credentials with mTLS and Client Certificate Authentication in the destination service 

Before forwarding messages to other systems, you must configure a destination for it in SAP BTP Cockpit. SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace now also supports the following authentication methods in the destination service to improve security:

  • OAuth2.0 Client Credentials with mTLS instead of using client ID and client secret
  • Client Certificate Authentication via upload 

Error message when rate limit of read service API is exceeded

An error message is now provided if the number of records you requested in the read service API exceeds the capacity limit.

‘Manage Models’ application: enhancements to email rule configuration

The following enhancements were made in the ‘Manage Models’ application for email rules:

  • You can now select specific rules to be exported instead of having to export all rules together.
  • When you import rules, the existing rules in the list will not be overwritten entirely. Instead, only those with the same description as the imported ones will be overwritten. The status of all imported rules is set to 'Inactive'. You can activate them as needed.
  • In the ‘If’ section of the Rule Settings tab, a new operator “is not null” is supported.
  • Save email rule as tile

 To remove a tile from the home screen, select the user and choose ‘Edit home screen’.

 ‘Configure Partner Connections’ app: supporting alternate tracking IDs in consumer API

In SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace, the LBN ID of your business partner is only mapped with one alternate ID, which is used when sending a tracking request via a Consumer API. If the business partner has multiple alternate IDs and asks you to use another one for a particular business context, you can now update the alternate ID as required.

For more, see Create Partner Connection in Configure Partner Connections.

Cache enabled when calling Configure Partner Connections API

To improve the system performance, a cache is now enabled when calling ‘Configure Partner Connections’ API internally. It needs at most 15 minutes to expire, so new changes you make in the Configure Partner Connections app will only take effect thereafter.

You can disable the cache in the ‘Manage Models’ app. For more, see Enable/Disable the Model Cache in Guide for Model Administrators.

All fulfillment tracking apps: display UN/LOCODE and IATA code in the location pop-up 

You can now view the UN/LOCODE and the IATA code in the location pop-up.

All fulfillment tracking apps: new sorting in tracking timeline

In the tracking timeline of detail pages, the new sorting criterion ‘Actual/Estimated/Planned Time (Using Actual Time First)’ was added. It means one of the following values of an event is used for sorting, prioritized in descending order:

  • Actual Time: If available, the actual time of event is used first.
  • Estimated Time: If the actual time is not available, the estimated time is used instead.
  • Planned Time: If neither actual nor estimated time is available, the planned time is used.

The sorting logic in the public access page of the Track Shipments app was also enhanced.

For more, see here.

‘Track Shipments’ app: columns in the tracking unit table rearranged 

On the 'Shipment Details' and 'Freight Unit Details' pages, the default columns displayed in the Tracking Units table were rearranged.

‘Track Shipments’ app: worklist enhancement regarding departure/arrival location, date, and time

On the worklist, you can now view more information with the following new columns added:

  • Departure Location / Departure Time
  • Arrival Location / Arrival Time

The grouping and reorganization of the columns improves the look and feel of the worklist. After you export the list to the spreadsheet, the columns therein are also rearranged.

For more, see View Shipments Worklist in Guide for Transportation Planners.

‘Track Shipments’ public page: estimated time now displayed

On the public track shipments page, you can now also see the estimated arrival time for unreported planned events. The sorting logic of events is changed accordingly.

For more, see Share Shipment Details via a Public Link in Guide for Transportation Planners.

‘Manage Outbound Deliveries’ and ‘Manage Inbound ASN’: show semantic colors for ‘My Execution Status’ 

In the ‘Manage Models’ app, you can now also define semantic colors for custom execution status of inbound and outbound deliveries. The Status of the following categories are shown in different colors:

  • Success (Green)
  • Inactive (Grey)
  • Error (Red)
  • Warning (Yellow)
  • Information (Blue)

This helps you distinguish between different status and assess the situation for timely and appropriate decision making. For more, see Define My Execution Status.

 

SAP Business Network, intelligent insights add-on

Performance monitoring using SAP Cloud ALM (Application Lifecycle Management)

Performance monitoring helps you, as IT administrators, identify and resolve critical issues related to end user performance and provides transparency in the actual performance experienced by end users.

SAP Business Network, intelligent insights add-on is now integrated with SAP Cloud ALM to support centralized performance monitoring. You can use the ‘Real User Monitoring’ app provided by SAP Cloud ALM to measure requests from SAP Business Network, intelligent insights add-on.

For more information on how to set up SAP Cloud ALM and use the app for performance monitoring refer to Setup and Administration Guide as well as Real User Monitoring.

 

Pease share and amplify our new features!

---------------------

The above summarizes the key innovations for 2412 and 2501. We hope you enjoy the new capabilities. Thanks for reading the blog post and stay tuned! 

A full overview of the 2412 and 2501 release can be found under the following link.

To learn more about SAP Business Network for Logistics visit SAP - Business Network for Logistics.

For further questions and feedback related to the blog, please check the Q&A area and feel free to post your questions under the link with the tag SAP Business Network for Logistics.

entry.title: Re: SOS
entry.content:
@yangcheng wrote:
When using MIGO for goods receipt, the system prompts "Material batch does not exist", but the material is indeed under batch management. What should be done in this case? HP Instant Ink

Hello @yangcheng,
Ensure the batch number is correctly entered in the material master and the batch is active. If the issue persists, check the batch search strategy and stock determination settings in your system configuration. 

Best regards,
Jack Henry

entry.title: I have a big question about SAP usage！
entry.content: As a newcomer to SAP, I would like to ask you what problems you have encountered in the process of using SAP? How did you solve it? What is the biggest feeling?

entry.title: Solution to Material Number Errors in SAP System
entry.content: When executing transaction code MM01 to create material master data, the system displays an error message 'Material number already exists', but I am confident that this is a new material. How can I solve this problem?

entry.title: Re: A warm welcome to our new SAP Champions in January 2025
entry.content: Congratulations and welcome to all the new SAP Champions! 🎉 Happy to see many familiar faces joining the program. 😊

entry.title: Re: eclipse find&replace ignores paste command
entry.content:
To me it seems like this:

There was a bug before Eclipse 4.34, that was fixed before the release of 4.34.

But in editors from ADT, this bug is still present. Maybe they were built on top of Eclipse's code from before the fix.

You can see that it works in Eclipse's general editor when creating a text file from File -> New -> Other -> General -> Untitled Text File.

entry.title: Re: How to connect SAP Data Services to Dataverse
entry.content:
Hi there,

You should really use one of the variants above Web Services (WS), CSV files, or OData APIs. Might help with the description, hope it will help someone.

So if you are using Web Services to connect SAP data services to Dynamics 365, you can call this directly from SAP data services, primarily through OData or SOAP protocols, which can be consumed by data services. You`ll just need to identify the Web Service endpoint in Dynamics, receive all creds and links, configure the Web Service Connection in SAP data services inputting all info gathered from Dynamics and we`re ready. Use the Web Service in your dataflow, you can directly integrate the data from Dynamics 365 by pulling it through the defined WS API.

The second variant is using CSV Files to Transfer Data if you have some troubles with API`s. Just export all required data from Dynamics to CSV, if you want, you can even automate this process in Dynamics. Import CSV Files into SAP Data Services, Once the CSV files are available, you should create Flat File datastore in SAP Data Services, and select the directory where the exported CSV files are stored. And then dap the data. Import also may be automated through SAP Data Services scheduling tools to automate transformation, and loading (ETL) of data from CSV files.

If you need some help, I can suggest to you cool guys that I know, they have Dynamics integration specialists https://www.hiredynamicsdevelopers.com/dynamics-365-integration-services/, also they can help with research in extraordinary cases and automation.

entry.title: Authorisation 'Revoke status "Closed" depending on order type
entry.content:
Dear Team,

please not, we have the following authorisation requirement.

There are different types of maintenance order types like PM01, SM01 etc.

A user should be able to cancle the business completiton ('Revoke status "Closed") only for order type SM01.

I created a PFCG-role only with authorisation for IW32. In my role I have authorization object 'I_VORG_ORD' =>field: order type = SM01, field: BETRVORG = BUAB ('Revoke status "Closed").

I assigned the role to my test user. Unfortunately, the user can now 'Revoke status "Closed" in both order types, not for only SM01, as  expected.

Please advise how can I achive the restriction that the user can only 'Revoke status "Closed" depending on order type.

Feedback is highly appreciated!

Best Regards and thanks in advance.

Magdalena

entry.title: P/L report revenue is showing as negative
entry.content:
I am reviewing a Profit & Loss report in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (FSV version FPA1) and I noticed that the Net Income is showing as a negative amount. I expected it to reflect a positive balance since this is revenue. 

Why is that?

entry.title: Re: 2502 C4C Release Discussion
entry.content:
In 24011 Release Webinar it was published, that there wil be no further webinar for SAP C4C V1. Only blogbost on community page will tell us about content of the furture release. 
SAP told me that there will be blogspost at the end of this week.

entry.title: New Learning Experience - reassign surveys
entry.content:
Hi 🖐, 

I am writing this post to ask for your collaboration.

With the new learning experience, the reassign survey feature is not currently supported.

For example, if you want to verify the effectiveness of the training, by assigning a survey to a manager to evaluate his employees, and that manager leaves the company or changes position, you can assign the surveys to the new manager by using the reassign function.

We consider it an essential function that needs to be migrated before the final activation in H1 2025 of the new user experience.

Please take a moment to review the idea https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/339501, and if you agree that it would be beneficial to your team, vote for it! 🙏

The more votes we get, the greater the chance that SAP will take this suggestion into consideration 👊

Thank you very much for your help and collaboration 😉

entry.title: Re: MDM - IDoc CREMAS in error without any message - No T...
entry.content: I had this same error and in my case it was due to there being an active BTE that had a COMMIT that was executed in the middle of the BATCH INPUT execution, preventing it from reporting the correct completion message.
